import React from "react"; import { useParams } from "react-router-dom"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { Row, Col, Image, ListGroup, Card, Button, ListGroupItem, } from "react-bootstrap"; import Rating from "../component/rating"; import Product from "../products"; const ProductScreen = () => { const { id: productId } = useParams(); const product = Product.find((p) => p._id === productId); console.log(product); return ( <> GoBack

{product.name}

 Price: {product.price} Price: ${product.price} Status: {product.countInStock > 0 ? "in Stock" : "out of Stock"} ); }; export default ProductScreen;
